description:
Configure bcWebCam to automatically send scanned barcode data to a web service via HTTP POST. Open bcWebCam's settings (gear icon), navigate to the output/network configuration section, enable HTTP/Web Service output, and set the target URL exactly to: http://192.168.1.50:8080/api/v1/scans

Save the settings so they persist. This allows scanned package barcodes to be logged instantly to the warehouse management system.
